{{CargoRelic
|name=Dragon Radar
|class_id=20038
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The radar was developed by the D. Dragon and can search for traces of dragons in the infinite space, making it easier to contact the Divine dragon. Anyone deemed a key client can get this cost-effective item from the D. Dragon!
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=13
|tech=29
|ss1=Dragon Orb Offering SPD +3%
|ss2=Dragon Orb Offering SPD +6%
|ss3=Dragon Orb Offering SPD +9%
|ss4=Dragon Orb Offering SPD +9%
|ss7=Dragon Orb Offering SPD +9%<br> (Awakened)
}}
